description_long: This is a traditional axe-style hammer with a long, slightly curved wooden handle and a robust, rectangular metal head. The handle is made of natural wood, showing a smooth finish with a gentle ergonomic curve for comfortable gripping. The head is solid, dark metal, featuring a broad, flat striking face and a wedge-shaped blade opposite the handle, typical of a splitting axe or maul. The connection between the handle and the head is secure, with the wood fitting tightly into the metal socket. There are no visible markings, logos, or decorative elements on either the handle or the head. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear, rust, or damage.
description: A long-handled wooden axe with a solid, dark metal head featuring a flat striking face and wedge blade. The tool is clean, sturdy, and free of visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the broad, flat metal head.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the thickness of the handle and the rectangular face of the metal head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curve and the wedge-shaped blade of the head.
description_view_3: View from the handle's end, emphasizing the ergonomic curve and the head's width.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic shape and natural finish.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular steel axe head with a flat striking face and wedge blade, typical of a splitting axe or maul.
